requirement_topic.en: EMC, Radio (ICASA) and Energy/Marking Obligations for Battery-Containing Products in South Africa
requirement_topic.zh: 南非含电池产品的EMC、无线电（ICASA）及能效/标识义务
requirement_topic.zht: 南非含電池產品的EMC、無線電（ICASA）及能效/標識義務

summary.en: South Africa does not use the EU CE mark. Electromagnetic compatibility and radio obligations are handled separately: (1) Radio and telecom equipment with radio functions (for example a power bank with wireless charging or a Bluetooth-enabled device) requires ICASA type approval under the Electronic Communications Act, with reference to SANS/ICASA technical standards; (2) EMC requirements for electrical and electronic products are addressed through applicable SANS standards (national adoptions of CISPR/IEC EMC standards) where invoked by a Compulsory Specification or by the host-product VC; (3) mandatory energy-efficiency labelling under SANS 941 applies to listed appliances and is administered with the NRCS — relevant where the battery is built into a regulated appliance rather than to bare cells. A standalone portable lithium battery or basic power bank without radio functions is primarily governed by safety (SANS IEC 62133-2) and any applicable VC, not by an EU-style CE/EMC marking regime.
summary.zh: 南非不使用欧盟CE标志。电磁兼容与无线电义务分别处理：（1）具备无线电功能的无线电及电信设备（例如带无线充电的移动电源或具蓝牙功能的设备），须依据《电子通信法》取得ICASA型号核准，并引用SANS/ICASA技术标准；（2）电气电子产品的EMC要求，在强制规范或载体产品VC援引时，通过适用的SANS标准（CISPR/IEC EMC标准的国家采用版）处理；（3）SANS 941下的强制能效标识适用于列明的器具，与NRCS共同管理——在电池内置于受管器具而非裸电芯时相关。无无线电功能的独立便携式锂电池或基础移动电源，主要受安全（SANS IEC 62133-2）及适用VC约束，而非欧盟式CE/EMC标识制度。
summary.zht: 南非不使用歐盟CE標誌。電磁相容與無線電義務分別處理：（1）具備無線電功能的無線電及電信設備（例如帶無線充電的行動電源或具藍牙功能的設備），須依據《電子通信法》取得ICASA型號核准，並引用SANS/ICASA技術標準；（2）電氣電子產品的EMC要求，在強制規範或載體產品VC援引時，透過適用的SANS標準（CISPR/IEC EMC標準的國家採用版）處理；（3）SANS 941下的強制能效標識適用於列明的器具，與NRCS共同管理——在電池內置於受管器具而非裸電芯時相關。無無線電功能的獨立便攜式鋰電池或基礎行動電源，主要受安全（SANS IEC 62133-2）及適用VC約束，而非歐盟式CE/EMC標識制度。

standards_or_laws: Electronic Communications Act 36 of 2005 — ICASA type approval for radio and telecom equipment
SANS adoptions of CISPR/IEC EMC standards (for example SANS CISPR 32 / SANS CISPR 11) where invoked
SANS 941 — Energy efficiency of electrical and electronic apparatus (mandatory labelling for listed appliances, administered with NRCS)

summary.en: In China, EMC and radio obligations are met through CCC certification (where the product is catalogued) which incorporates GB EMC standards (GB/T 9254, GB 17743, etc.), and through SRRC type approval for radio transmitters issued by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology. China does not use the CE mark; CCC is the domestic conformity mark. GB EMC and SRRC approvals are not recognised by ICASA or under South African EMC/energy-labelling requirements, so a Chinese exporter with CCC and SRRC must still obtain ICASA type approval for radio functions and meet the SANS-referenced EMC and SANS 941 obligations where applicable.
summary.zh: 在中国，EMC与无线电义务通过CCC认证（产品被目录覆盖时）满足，其纳入GB EMC标准（GB/T 9254、GB 17743等），无线电发射设备则通过工业和信息化部签发的SRRC型号核准满足。中国不使用CE标志；CCC是国内合格标志。GB EMC及SRRC核准不被ICASA或南非EMC/能效标识要求认可，因此持有CCC和SRRC的中国出口商，仍须就无线电功能取得ICASA型号核准，并在适用时满足SANS引用的EMC及SANS 941义务。
summary.zht: 在中國，EMC與無線電義務透過CCC認證（產品被目錄覆蓋時）滿足，其納入GB EMC標準（GB/T 9254、GB 17743等），無線電發射設備則透過工業和信息化部簽發的SRRC型號核准滿足。中國不使用CE標誌；CCC是國內合格標誌。GB EMC及SRRC核准不被ICASA或南非EMC/能效標識要求認可，因此持有CCC和SRRC的中國出口商，仍須就無線電功能取得ICASA型號核准，並在適用時滿足SANS引用的EMC及SANS 941義務。

standards_or_laws: CCC certification incorporating GB/T 9254 / GB 17743 EMC standards (where catalogued)
SRRC type approval (MIIT) for radio transmitting equipment
GB 4943.1 — safety of information technology / audio-video equipment (host-product context)

gap.en: South Africa splits obligations that the EU bundles under CE. Gaps for Chinese exporters: (1) any radio function (wireless charging, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi) requires separate ICASA type approval — CCC/SRRC are not accepted; (2) EMC is evidenced against SANS adoptions of CISPR/IEC standards where invoked, not against GB EMC standards; (3) if the battery is integrated into a listed appliance, mandatory SANS 941 energy-efficiency labelling may apply. A bare cell or basic power bank without radio is mainly a safety/VC question, but exporters must check the radio and host-appliance dimensions early because ICASA approval and any SANS 941 labelling are separate processes from the NRCS safety route.
gap.zh: 南非将欧盟在CE下捆绑的义务拆分。中国出口商的差距：（1）任何无线电功能（无线充电、蓝牙、Wi-Fi）须单独取得ICASA型号核准——CCC/SRRC不被接受；（2）EMC在被援引时须依CISPR/IEC标准的SANS采用版而非GB EMC标准提供证据；（3）若电池集成于列明器具，可能适用强制性SANS 941能效标识。无无线电的裸电芯或基础移动电源主要属安全/VC问题，但出口商须尽早核查无线电及载体器具维度，因为ICASA核准及任何SANS 941标识是与NRCS安全路径分离的独立流程。
gap.zht: 南非將歐盟在CE下捆綁的義務拆分。中國出口商的差距：（1）任何無線電功能（無線充電、藍牙、Wi-Fi）須單獨取得ICASA型號核准——CCC/SRRC不被接受；（2）EMC在被援引時須依CISPR/IEC標準的SANS採用版而非GB EMC標準提供證據；（3）若電池集成於列明器具，可能適用強制性SANS 941能效標識。無無線電的裸電芯或基礎行動電源主要屬安全/VC問題，但出口商須儘早核查無線電及載體器具維度，因為ICASA核准及任何SANS 941標識是與NRCS安全路徑分離的獨立流程。

mandatory_status.target: Conditionally mandatory — ICASA type approval is mandatory for products with radio functions; SANS-referenced EMC applies where invoked by a VC or host-product specification; SANS 941 energy labelling is mandatory for listed appliances. There is no EU-style CE/EMC marking; a basic non-radio battery is governed mainly by SANS IEC 62133-2 safety and any applicable VC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory where catalogued — CCC certification (incorporating GB EMC standards) and SRRC radio type approval are required for relevant catalogued products sold in China; not recognised in South Africa

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] South Africa does not use the EU CE mark and splits EMC, radio and energy obligations across NRCS/SANS, ICASA, and SANS 941. Chinese exporters should determine whether their product has radio functions (triggering ICASA type approval), whether a VC invokes SANS EMC standards, and whether a host appliance triggers SANS 941 energy labelling. Chinese CCC and SRRC approvals are not recognised in South Africa, so equivalent local approvals must be obtained for the relevant dimensions; a basic non-radio battery is mainly a SANS IEC 62133-2 safety and VC matter.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南非不使用欧盟CE标志，并将EMC、无线电及能效义务分置于NRCS/SANS、ICASA及SANS 941。中国出口商应确认其产品是否具备无线电功能（触发ICASA型号核准）、是否有VC援引SANS EMC标准，以及载体器具是否触发SANS 941能效标识。中国CCC和SRRC核准在南非不被认可，因此须就相关维度取得对应的本地核准；无无线电的基础电池主要属SANS IEC 62133-2安全及VC事项。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南非不使用歐盟CE標誌，並將EMC、無線電及能效義務分置於NRCS/SANS、ICASA及SANS 941。中國出口商應確認其產品是否具備無線電功能（觸發ICASA型號核准）、是否有VC援引SANS EMC標準，以及載體器具是否觸發SANS 941能效標識。中國CCC和SRRC核准在南非不被認可，因此須就相關維度取得對應的本地核准；無無線電的基礎電池主要屬SANS IEC 62133-2安全及VC事項。

source.publisher: Independent Communications Authority of South Africa (ICASA)
